request.text: How many draft incidents are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name = 'draft' LIMIT 100

request.text: How many high severity incidents?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE severity_name = 'high' LIMIT 100

request.text: How many critical severity incidents are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE severity_name = 'critical' LIMIT 100

request.text: How many pending incidents?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name IN ('pending', 'draft') LIMIT 100

request.text: Show incident count by status

sql.query: SELECT status_name, COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY status_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 100

request.text: Show incident count by severity

sql.query: SELECT r.severity_name, COUNT(*) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all r GROUP BY r.severity_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: Show incident count by category

sql.query: SELECT category_name, COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 100

request.text: Show incident count by department

sql.query: SELECT department_name, COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY department_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: Which category has the most incidents?

sql.query: SELECT category_name, COUNT(*) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC LIMIT 1

request.text: Which department has the most incidents?

sql.query: SELECT department_name, COUNT(*) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY department_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC LIMIT 1

request.text: Show incident count by location

sql.query: SELECT l.location_name, COUNT(*) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all r JOIN mv_recovery_all l ON r.location_name = l.location_name GROUP BY l.location_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: Show top 5 incident categories

sql.query: SELECT category_name, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 5

request.text: How many incidents were created this month?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE created_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents were created this year?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents were created this week?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE created_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents were created last month?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE created_date >= DATEADD(month, -1, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AND created_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents were created last week?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE created_date >= DATEADD(week, -1, DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)) AND created_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents were created in the last 30 days?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE created_date >= (DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents were completed this month?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name = 'completed' AND DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents were created in the last 7 days?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE created_date >= (DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_DATE)) LIMIT 100

request.text: Show the monthly incident trend

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

request.text: Show the weekly incident trend for this year

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', created_date) AS week, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY week ORDER BY week LIMIT 100

request.text: Show the daily incident trend this month

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_date) AS day, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE created_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY day ORDER BY day LIMIT 100

request.text: Show monthly trend of completed incidents

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name = 'completed' GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

request.text: Show monthly incident count by severity

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS total_incidents, severity_name FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY MONTH, severity_name ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

request.text: Show weekly trend of open incidents

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', created_date) AS week, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name = 'pending' GROUP BY week ORDER BY week LIMIT 100

request.text: What is the average actual cost per incident?

sql.query: SELECT AVG(m.actual_cost) AS average_actual_cost FROM mv_recovery_all m LIMIT 100

request.text: Show average cost by category

sql.query: SELECT category_name, AVG(actual_cost) AS avg_cost FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE actual_cost > 0 GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY avg_cost DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: Show average cost by severity

sql.query: SELECT r.severity_name, AVG(r.actual_cost) AS average_cost FROM mv_recovery_all r GROUP BY r.severity_name ORDER BY average_cost DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: What is the total actual cost of all incidents?

sql.query: SELECT SUM(actual_cost) AS total_actual_cost FROM mv_recovery_all LIMIT 100

request.text: Show top 5 categories by average cost

sql.query: SELECT category_name, AVG(actual_cost) AS avg_cost FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE actual_cost > 0 GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY avg_cost DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5

request.text: How many high severity open incidents are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE severity_name = 'high' AND status_name IN ('pending', 'draft') LIMIT 100

request.text: How many critical incidents are pending?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name IN ('pending', 'draft') AND severity_name = 'critical' LIMIT 100

request.text: How many completed high severity incidents are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name = 'completed' AND severity_name = 'high' LIMIT 100

request.text: How many VIP guest incidents are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE vip IS NOT NULL AND vip != '' LIMIT 100

request.text: How many high severity incidents were created this month?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE severity_name = 'high' AND DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many open critical incidents are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name = 'pending' AND severity_name = 'critical' LIMIT 100

request.text: What percentage of incidents are completed?

sql.query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN status_name = 'completed' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS pct_completed FROM mv_recovery_all LIMIT 100

request.text: What percentage of incidents are open?

sql.query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN status_name = 'pending' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS pct_pending FROM mv_recovery_all LIMIT 100

request.text: What percentage of incidents are high or critical severity?

sql.query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN severity_name IN ('high', 'critical') THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS proportion_high_or_critical FROM mv_recovery_all LIMIT 100

request.text: What percentage of incidents created this month are completed?

sql.query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN status_name = 'completed' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS pct_completed FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE date_trunc('month', created_date) = date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: Show the 10 most recent incidents

sql.query: SELECT recovery_no, incident_name, status_name, severity_name, created_date FROM mv_recovery_all ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT 10

request.text: Show the 5 most recent completed incidents

sql.query: SELECT recovery_no, incident_name, status_name, severity_name, created_date FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE status_name = 'completed' ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT 5

request.text: Show recent high severity incidents

sql.query: SELECT recovery_no, incident_name, status_name, severity_name, created_date FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE severity_name = 'high' ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT 10

request.text: Show recent incidents with their categories and status

sql.query: SELECT r.recovery_no, r.incident_name, r.status_name, r.category_name, r.created_date FROM mv_recovery_all r ORDER BY r.created_date DESC LIMIT 10

request.text: Show the most recent VIP guest incidents

sql.query: SELECT r.recovery_no, r.incident_name, r.status_name, r.severity_name, r.created_date FROM mv_recovery_all r WHERE r.vip IS NOT NULL AND r.vip != '' ORDER BY r.created_date DESC LIMIT 10

request.text: How many incidents are there at The Peninsula Manila?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Manila' LIMIT 100

request.text: How many open incidents does Peninsula Hong Kong have?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Hong Kong' AND status_name = 'pending' LIMIT 100

request.text: Show incident count by category for The Peninsula Tokyo

sql.query: SELECT category_name, COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Tokyo' GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents happened this month?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE date_trunc('month', created_date) = date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents happened this month in The Peninsula Bangkok?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Bangkok' AND DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

request.text: How many total incidents were there in The Peninsula Bangkok?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Bangkok' LIMIT 100

request.text: How many critical incidents were there in The Peninsula Bangkok?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Bangkok' AND severity_name = 'critical' LIMIT 100

request.text: Give me the trend critical incidents in The Peninsula Bangkok?

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Bangkok' AND severity_name = 'critical' GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

request.text: Give me the trend of critical incidents in The Peninsula Bangkok?

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Bangkok' AND severity_name = 'critical' GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

request.text: Give me the trend of critical incidents.

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE severity_name = 'critical' GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

request.text: Compare incidents between The Peninsula Bangkok and The Peninsula Manila

sql.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Bangkok') AS bangkok_incidents, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Manila') AS manila_incidents LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents are there in The Peninsula Bangkok

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Bangkok' LIMIT 100

request.text: Show the trend of incidents

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 100

request.text: Compare number of incidents between The Peninsula Bangkok and The Peninsula Manila

sql.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Bangkok') - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name = 'The Peninsula Manila') AS difference LIMIT 100

request.text: Bar chart for the number of incidents between The Peninsula Bangkok and The Peninsula Manila

sql.query: SELECT date_trunc('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name IN ('The Peninsula Bangkok', 'The Peninsula Manila') GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

request.text: How many incidents are there for The Peninsula Bangkok and The Peninsula Manila

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE property_name IN ('The Peninsula Bangkok', 'The Peninsula Manila') LIMIT 100

request.text: Show maintenance count by status

sql.query: SELECT s.status_name, COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id GROUP BY s.status_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: Show incident count by status

sql.query: SELECT status_name, COUNT(*) FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY status_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 100

request.text: Show me the monthly incident trend

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS incidents FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 100

request.text: show the 10 most recent incidents

sql.query: SELECT recovery_no, incident_name, status_name, severity_name, created_date FROM mv_recovery_all ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT 10

request.text: which category has the most incidents?

sql.query: SELECT category_name, COUNT(*) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC LIMIT 1

request.text: show incident count by department

sql.query: SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(r.recovery_no) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all r JOIN mv_recovery_all d ON r.department_name = d.department_name GROUP BY d.department_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: show incident count by department for the past 30 days

sql.query: SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(*) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all r JOIN mv_recovery_all d ON r.department_name = d.department_name WHERE r.created_date >= (DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)) GROUP BY d.department_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: show top 5 incident categories

sql.query: SELECT category_name, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 5

request.text: show top 10 incident categories

sql.query: SELECT category_name, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 10

request.text: show top 10 incident categories by bar chart

sql.query: SELECT category_name, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 10

request.text: show top 5 categories by average cost

sql.query: SELECT category_name, AVG(actual_cost) AS avg_cost FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE actual_cost > 0 GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY avg_cost DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5

request.text: show top 10 categories by average cost

sql.query: SELECT category_name, AVG(actual_cost) AS avg_cost FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE actual_cost > 0 GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY avg_cost DESC LIMIT 10

sql.query: SELECT category_name, AVG(actual_cost) AS avg_cost FROM mv_recovery_all WHERE actual_cost > 0 GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY avg_cost DESC LIMIT 10

request.text: show incident count by location

sql.query: SELECT location_name, COUNT(*) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all GROUP BY location_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

request.text: show top 10 incident counts by location

sql.query: SELECT l.location_name, COUNT(*) AS incident_count FROM mv_recovery_all r JOIN mv_recovery_all l ON r.location_name = l.location_name GROUP BY l.location_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC LIMIT 10
